side_effects.description: Massive head rush, fainting, vomiting, diarrhea, dizziness, weakness, swelling of lips/eyes/neck, stomach pain, periodic watery stool, difficulty walking, major head rushes upon standing, uncontrolled sneezing

protocol_notes: Product labeled as TB-500 (Thymosin Beta 4) 5mg but OP later discovered it was actually TB4. Prior usage 6 weeks earlier at same dose (2.5mg) caused no reaction. Had taken BPC-157 and TB-500 together starting 2 months prior for 3 weeks, then stopped due to persistent itching. This dose was newly reconstituted with same BAC water. Suspected possible allergic sensitization from prior exposure. Source: NAPS.
